rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JEFF KENNEDY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 6: Plaintiffs' Petition To Compel Arbitration: Hearing Required to address duplicative actions and possibility of inconsistent rulings. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS MCELLIGOTT VS. ASIF SIDDIQUE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT ASIF SIDDIQUE'S Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement: DENIED without prejudice. No Exhibit D is attached to David Bacho's Declaration submitted to the Court. Proof of Service indicates that Javier Claudio "attorney" was served by leaving a copy of the motion "with a receptionist or an individual in charge of the office." No evidence is provided that Javier Claudio, alleged to be a contractor in the complaint, is an attorney or that 172 Melissa Cir. Daly City, CA is an office with a receptionist. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIANO BUSTO et al VS. ALEJANDRO V. DIESTA JR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANTS RAJAN DIESTA and ROSEALEX DIESTA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: Continued to September 3, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501 on Court's own motion. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIANO BUSTO et al VS. ALEJANDRO V. DIESTA JR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANTS RAJAN DIESTA and ROSEALEX DIESTA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Continued to September 3, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501 on Court's own motion. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAITRI COMPASSIONATE CARE, A CALIFORNIA NOT PROFIT VS. AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION DBA OUT OF THE CLOSET, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANT AIDS HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION dba OUT OF THE CLOSET's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Hearing Required to address WDT-Winchester case, 27 Cal.App.4th 516. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RWW PROPERTIES , LLC VS. ZHEN ZHEN YU FANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT YOU CHANG'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: GRANTED with leave to amend to allege proper stating date for accrual of daily damages occasioned by unlawful detainer after expiration of the Notice. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RWW PROPERTIES , LLC VS. ZHEN ZHEN YU FANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT YOU CHANG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action under CCP 1161a and is addressed to trustor/individuals taking under the trustor. Whether the moving party is a tenant entitled to protections of SFRO is an issue of fact not properly raised on demurrer. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1874 MARKET STREET, LLC VS. GRISELDA UMANA ROMERO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 9: DEFENDANT GRISELDA ROMERO'S MOTION TO STRIKE Portions of 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Granted as to paragraph 9 of complaint and paragraph 3 of the prayer. No opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 300 BUCHANAN C1, LLC VS. NICOLE MOSKOWITZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT NICOLE MOSKOWITZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition landlord's right to terminate tenancy under CCP 1161(4) "illegal use" provision is limited by remedies outlined in the Administrative Code. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS, LLC VS. LEON EDWARDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 7: DEFENDANT LEON EDWARDS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed on August 21, 2014. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NAVNIT PATEL VS. DAVID SETHER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 25, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANT DAVID SETHER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Sustained with 5-day leave to amend to address all issues raised in by in demurrer. Non-opposition filed. (501/REQ)
